instruments.name: Music Basics
instruments.description: A pre-instrumental programme introducing children to music fundamentals through singing, movement, rhythm games, and basic notation. A fun and engaging first step into the world of music.
instruments.summary: Ages 5–6. A fun introduction to music fundamentals.

instruments.name: Violin
instruments.description: Learn violin in a supportive group setting. Students develop bowing technique, posture, and music reading skills while playing together with their peers.
instruments.summary: Ages 7+. Learn violin in a supportive group setting.

instruments.name: Cello
instruments.description: Explore the rich tones of the cello in group lessons. Cellos are available for hire ($100/year) for students who don't yet have their own instrument.

instruments.name: Keyboard
instruments.description: Build keyboard skills including reading music, chord progressions, and playing melodies. A popular class — waitlists may apply.

instruments.name: Guitar
instruments.description: Learn acoustic guitar basics including chords, strumming patterns, and simple songs. A very popular class — waitlists may apply.

instruments.name: Flute
instruments.description: Develop breath control, tone production, and fingering technique in group flute lessons. Suited to slightly older students who can manage the instrument.

instruments.name: Recorder
instruments.description: A wonderful first wind instrument. Students learn music reading, breath control, and ensemble playing through the recorder.

instruments.name: Trumpet
instruments.description: Build embouchure, breath support, and brass playing skills. Students learn together in an encouraging group environment.

instruments.name: Drums
instruments.description: Develop rhythm, coordination, and percussion skills. Learn to read rhythmic notation and play a variety of styles and patterns.

instruments.name: Choir
instruments.description: Open to all Gallery students at no extra cost! Sing together in a fun, supportive group and perform at the annual concert.

instruments.name: Pat Sviatko Ensemble
instruments.description: The Pat Sviatko Ensemble welcomes cello and violin students who have studied for two years and can read music. Develop ensemble skills, collaborative listening, and perform at the annual concert.
instruments.summary: Cello & violin students with 2+ years experience.

instruments.name: Orchestra
instruments.description: The Gallery Community Orchestra is open to all ages at no extra cost. For students with approximately 3 years of prior tuition. See our Community Orchestra page for more details.
instruments.summary: Free! For students with 3+ years experience.
